mapper.insert: insert into SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP (task_id, group_name, DATA_NAME, output_type, sort_no, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, frequency_hz, target_num, enabled, IS_SIMULATION) values (#{taskId}, #{groupName}, #{dataName}, #{outputType}, #{sortNo}, #{startTimeMs}, #{endTimeMs}, #{frequencyHz}, #{targetNum}, #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isSimulation})

insert into SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP ( task_id, group_name, DATA_NAME, output_type, sort_no, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, frequency_hz, target_num, enabled, IS_SIMULATION ) values
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.dataName}, #{item.outputType}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.startTimeMs}, #{item.endTimeMs}, #{item.frequencyHz}, #{item.targetNum}, #{item.enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.isSimulation} )
mapper.update: update SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP set task_id = #{taskId}, group_name = #{groupName}, data_name = #{dataName}, output_type = #{outputType}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, start_time_ms = #{startTimeMs}, end_time_ms = #{endTimeMs}, frequency_hz = #{frequencyHz}, target_num = #{targetNum}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, is_simulation = #{isSimulation} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP where task_id = #{taskId} order by case when sort_no is null then 1 else 0 end asc, sort_no asc, start_time_ms asc, id asc
select * from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.TASK_DATA_GROUP where task_id = #{taskId} and ENABLED = 1 order by case when sort_no is null then 1 else 0 end asc, sort_no asc, start_time_ms asc, id asc
